name: The Silver Gauntlet of Aethel, Book II: The Shadow's Heart (Original Motion Picture Soundtrack)
description: Part two of the definitive 3-disc 'Leviathan Cut' soundtrack for the Aethel Saga. Book II: The Shadow's Heart plunges into the dark, psychological core of the story, featuring the epic villain anthem 'The Tyrant's Throne' and the emotional climax 'I Can't Live Without You'.
